policyname: Users can manage their own subscriptions

with_check:
((auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) AND ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = ANY (ARRAY['professor'::user_role, 'admin'::user_role, 'super_admin'::user_role]))))) OR (((auth.jwt() ->> 'email'::text) ~~* '%@colegiosaojudas.com.br'::text) OR ((auth.jwt() ->> 'email'::text) ~~* '%@sj.pro.br'::text))))
